'''''Dindoo's Glory''''' was the personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] entrepreneur [[Kelko]].

Once Kelko became rich, he named his ship as an homage to his long-dead stepfather and mentor,
[[Dindoo]], the one who had taught Kelko everything he knew.

Kelko, a talented pilot, would take the ''Dindoo's Glory'' for short excursions with only
[[WED00-88|Weedo]], his old and trusty [[Droid/Legends|droid]], as company, while leaving his wife, [[Shinba]], and their children
behind.

{{Ship-stub}}
